prompt: Two workers on the same revision disagree because one receives CHILI_EXPERIMENTAL_GATE=0, yet the gate is reported enabled. Diagnose and fix the environment-value interpretation without renaming the flag.

repo_files.env_report.py:
def present_setting(name: str, value: str) -> str:
    return f"{name}={value}"
repo_files.tests/test_public.py:
from feature_gate import gate_enabled


def test_explicit_one_is_enabled():
    name = "CHILI_EXPERIMENTAL_GATE"
    assert gate_enabled({name: "1"}, name) is True
